problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
